welcome:
Welcome to AgriPulse! I'll help you connect with local farmers.

Let's get started by setting up your profile.
shareLocation:
Please share your location so we can match you with nearby farmers.

You can:
1. Press the 📎 > Location button to share GPS
2. Or type your area name (e.g. "Shah Alam")
enterDemand:
Now, please enter your demands one by one.

Format: <crop name> <quantity>
Example: Kangkung 50kg

Type /done when finished.
demandAdded:
Added: {crop} — {quantity}

Continue adding or type /done to finish.
demandAddedError: Sorry, I couldn't understand that demand. Please use the format: Kangkung 50kg
noDemands: You haven't entered any demands yet. Please enter at least one demand before finishing.
selectFrequency: How often do you need this supply?
profileSaved:
Your profile has been saved! We'll match you with nearby farmers.

Use /status to view your profile.
Use /update to modify your demands.
Use /surplus to notify surplus availability.
noProfile: You don't have a profile yet. Please use /start to register.
surplusPrompt:
Please enter your surplus produce.

Format: <crop name> <quantity>
Example: Kangkung 100kg
surplusNotify:
🔔 *Surplus Notification!*

A farmer in {area} has surplus:
{crop} — {quantity}

Contact them for fresh supply!
surplusPosted: Your surplus has been notified to {count} buyers in {area}.
surplusNoBuyers: No buyers found in your area who need {crop} at this time.
langPrompt: Sila pilih bahasa / Please select language / 请选择语言:
updatePrompt:
Please enter your new demands one by one.
Format: Kangkung 50kg

Old demands will be replaced.
Type /done when finished.

errors.general: Sorry, an error occurred. Please try again.
errors.invalidFormat: Invalid format. Please use the format: Kangkung 50kg
errors.locationFailed: Sorry, couldn't identify your location. Please try again.
errors.alreadyRegistered: You are already registered. Use /update to modify demands or /status to view your profile.

noWeatherData: No weather data available for this area.
